description: The yield envelope for this model involves a von-Mises criterion. The position of a stress point on this envelope is controlled by an associated flow rule for shear failure.

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: Material properties for the 'von-mises' zone constitutive model. Assign the model with 'zone cmodel assign von-mises [range ...]', then set these with 'zone property <keyword> <value> [range cmodel-name von-mises]'.

properties.description: kinematic plastic (hardening) modulus, H (see Figure 2). The default value is zero. Be aware that this is not the elastoplastic tangent modulus, E_t. The relationship between H and E_t is shown in Figure 2.
